title: The Duel.
content:
I took my power in my hand.
    And went against the world;
    'T was not so much as David had,
    But I was twice as bold.

    I aimed my pebble, but myself
    Was all the one that fell.
    Was it Goliath was too large,
    Or only I too small?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "The Duel."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
